chunks.title: Sons of Benjamin and Ehud
chunks.reason: Lists the descendants of Benjamin and the sons of Ehud.

chunks.title: Sons of Shaharaim and Elpaal
chunks.reason: Details the families of Shaharaim and Elpaal including their settlements.

chunks.title: Sons of Beriah and Shimei
chunks.reason: Continues the genealogical list through Beriah, Elpaal, Shimei, and Jeroham.

chunks.title: Heads of Households in Gibeon
chunks.reason: Identifies the heads of households living in Jerusalem and Gibeon.

chunks.title: Lineage of Saul and His Descendants
chunks.reason: Traces the family line from Ner to Saul and his descendants.
